title: zabelia insularis
intro: Zabelia insularis, also known as the Korean box or island boxwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. It is native to the Korean Peninsula and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Zabelia insularis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Zabelia insularis can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional herbal medicine.
